response.original_title: The Hunger Strike to End the AI Race
response.overview: In September 2025, three people launched hunger strikes outside AI companies Anthropic and Google DeepMind, demanding their CEOs stop racing to build superintelligence. This documentary explains what happened.
response.tagline: What happens when three people stop eating outside a billion-dollar AI company?
response.title: The Hunger Strike to End the AI Race
